# Fathom

Deterministic reasoning runtime for AI agents

## Pages

- [Home](https://fathom-rules.dev/_index/)
- [Getting Started](https://fathom-rules.dev/getting-started/)
- [Tutorials](https://fathom-rules.dev/tutorials/index/) — Progressive, hands-on tutorials that walk you through building policy engines with Fathom.
- [Hello-world policy](https://fathom-rules.dev/tutorials/hello-world/) — Install Fathom, write a template and a rule in YAML, evaluate a fact, and inspect the evaluation result.
- [Modules & salience](https://fathom-rules.dev/tutorials/modules-and-salience/) — Use modules and salience to build a fail-closed policy where deny always overrides allow.
- [Core Primitives](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/primitives/)
- [CLIPS Runtime](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/runtime/)
- [YAML Compiler](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/yaml-compiler/)
- [Fact Asserter](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/fact-asserter/)
- [Forward Chaining](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/forward-chaining/)
- [Working Memory](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/working-memory/)
- [Audit Log](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/audit-log/)
- [Attestation Service](https://fathom-rules.dev/core/attestation/)
- [Templates](https://fathom-rules.dev/yaml/yaml-templates/)
- [Facts](https://fathom-rules.dev/yaml/yaml-facts/)
- [Rules](https://fathom-rules.dev/yaml/yaml-rule-language/)
- [Modules](https://fathom-rules.dev/yaml/yaml-modules/)
- [Functions](https://fathom-rules.dev/yaml/yaml-functions/)
- [Reference](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/index/) — Generated reference for every Fathom SDK, API, and tooling surface.
- [Python SDK](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/python-sdk/index/)
- [Go SDK](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/go-sdk/index/) — Fathom Go client reference (generated from godoc via gomarkdoc)
- [TypeScript SDK](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/typescript-sdk/index/) — Fathom TS client reference (generated from TSDoc via typedoc)
- [REST API](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rest/index/) — Fathom REST API reference, try-it console, and client exports
- [REST API — Try It](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rest/try/) — Interactive Swagger UI against the Fathom REST API
- [gRPC API](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/grpc/index/) — Fathom gRPC service reference, generated from protos/fathom.proto
- [MCP Tool Manifest](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/mcp/index/) — Machine-readable index of Fathom MCP tools
- [YAML Reference](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/yaml/index/) — JSON Schemas for Fathom YAML constructs
- [CLI Reference](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/cli/index/) — Index of `fathom` CLI commands
- [VSCode Tooling](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/tooling/vscode/index/) — Snippets and JSON Schema association for Fathom YAML files
- [owasp-agentic](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rule-packs/owasp-agentic/) — Rule pack — owasp-agentic
- [nist-800-53](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rule-packs/nist-800-53/) — Rule pack — nist-800-53
- [hipaa](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rule-packs/hipaa/) — Rule pack — hipaa
- [cmmc](https://fathom-rules.dev/reference/rule-packs/cmmc/) — Rule pack — cmmc
